sourcesContent:
const categoryImage = (keywords, lock) =>
  `https://loremflickr.com/800/500/${keywords}?lock=${lock}`;

const productImages = (keywords, baseLock) => [
  `https://loremflickr.com/900/900/${keywords}?lock=${baseLock}`,
  `https://loremflickr.com/900/900/${keywords}?lock=${baseLock + 1}`,
  `https://loremflickr.com/900/900/${keywords}?lock=${baseLock + 2}`,
  `https://loremflickr.com/900/900/${keywords}?lock=${baseLock + 3}`,
];

export const categories = [
  {
    id: "fashion",
    label: "Fashion",
    image: categoryImage("fashion,clothing", 11),
  },
  {
    id: "electronics",
    label: "Electronics",
    image: categoryImage("electronics,gadgets", 12),
  },
  {
    id: "home-decor",
    label: "Home Decor",
    image: categoryImage("home,decor,interior", 13),
  },
  {
    id: "beauty",
    label: "Beauty",
    image: categoryImage("beauty,skincare,cosmetics", 14),
  },
];

export const products = [
  {
    id: "1",
    title: "Wireless Noise Cancelling Headphones",
    category: "Electronics",
    rating: 4.8,
    price: 179.99,
    description:
      "Immersive over-ear headphones with deep bass, crystal-clear calls, and up to 30 hours of battery life.",
    images: productImages("headphones,audio,electronics", 101),
  },
  {
    id: "2",
    title: "Active Mesh Sneakers",
    category: "Fashion",
    rating: 4.6,
    price: 89.99,
    description:
      "Lightweight sneakers with breathable mesh upper and cushioned sole for all-day comfort.",
    images: productImages("sneakers,shoes,running", 111),
  },
  {
    id: "3",
    title: "Smart Fitness Watch",
    category: "Electronics",
    rating: 4.7,
    price: 129.99,
    description:
      "Track heart rate, sleep, activity, and notifications with a bright always-on display.",
    images: productImages("smartwatch,fitness,watch", 121),
  },
  {
    id: "4",
    title: "Premium Leather Tote Bag",
    category: "Fashion",
    rating: 4.5,
    price: 119.99,
    description:
      "Elegant daily tote with structured silhouette, premium finish, and roomy interior pocketing.",
    images: productImages("leather,bag,tote", 131),
  },
  {
    id: "5",
    title: "Ceramic Vase Set",
    category: "Home Decor",
    rating: 4.4,
    price: 54.99,
    description:
      "Minimal matte ceramic vases designed to pair with fresh stems and dried arrangements.",
    images: productImages("ceramic,vase,decor", 141),
  },
  {
    id: "6",
    title: "Hydrating Skin Care Kit",
    category: "Beauty",
    rating: 4.9,
    price: 72.5,
    description:
      "Complete hydration routine with cleanser, serum, and moisturizer for daily glow.",
    images: productImages("skincare,beauty,cosmetics", 151),
  },
  {
    id: "7",
    title: "Wireless Earbuds Pro",
    category: "Electronics",
    rating: 4.6,
    price: 99.0,
    description:
      "Compact true wireless earbuds with adaptive EQ and low-latency performance.",
    images: productImages("earbuds,audio,wireless", 161),
  },
  {
    id: "8",
    title: "Modern Accent Lamp",
    category: "Home Decor",
    rating: 4.3,
    price: 64.99,
    description:
      "Soft ambient table lamp with brushed metal base and warm-tone fabric shade.",
    images: productImages("lamp,lighting,interior", 171),
  },
  {
    id: "9",
    title: "Running Shoes Elite",
    category: "Fashion",
    rating: 4.5,
    price: 109.99,
    description:
      "Performance running shoes with responsive foam and reinforced heel support.",
    images: productImages("running,shoes,sneakers", 181),
  },
  {
    id: "10",
    title: "Bluetooth Speaker Mini",
    category: "Electronics",
    rating: 4.2,
    price: 59.99,
    description:
      "Portable mini speaker with rich audio profile and up to 12 hours playback.",
    images: productImages("bluetooth,speaker,audio", 191),
  },
  {
    id: "11",
    title: "Velvet Cushion Pack",
    category: "Home Decor",
    rating: 4.1,
    price: 39.99,
    description:
      "Set of soft velvet cushions with subtle texture to elevate living room styling.",
    images: productImages("cushion,pillow,home", 201),
  },
  {
    id: "12",
    title: "Vitamin C Glow Serum",
    category: "Beauty",
    rating: 4.7,
    price: 34.99,
    description:
      "Lightweight brightening serum that helps reduce dullness and improve texture.",
    images: productImages("serum,skincare,beauty", 211),
  },
];
